findings.title: Floating latest runner label can hide image migrations
findings.recommended: Pin runner labels where reproducibility matters.

findings.title: Actions cache v1/v2 is retired
findings.recommended: Replace with actions/cache@v4 and rerun the workflow.

findings.title: Artifact action v3 is retired on GitHub.com
findings.recommended: Replace with actions/upload-artifact@v4 and rerun the workflow.

findings.title: Artifact action v3 is retired on GitHub.com
findings.recommended: Replace with actions/download-artifact@v4 and rerun the workflow.

findings.title: Workflow does not declare GITHUB_TOKEN permissions
findings.recommended: Declare least-privilege top-level or job-level permissions.

patches.title: Actions cache v1/v2 is retired; Artifact action v3 is retired on GitHub.com
patches.diff:
--- a/.github/workflows/build.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/build.yml
@@ -9,15 +9,15 @@
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: actions/cache@v2
+      - uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: ~/.cache/pip
           key: pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt') }}
       - run: pytest
-      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: coverage
           path: htmlcov
-      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
+      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: coverage

notes: Runs locally; no GitHub token, source upload, or repository mutation required.
Only deterministic action-version upgrades are patched automatically.
Runner, permissions, and runtime findings are reported for review.
